heading: Amendments to Articles of Agreement in resolution on Merger of Interregional and Ordinary Capital Resources
label: 283z–4 Amendments to Articles of Agreement in resolution on Merger of Interregional and Ordinary Capital Resources
text: The United States Governor of the Inter-American Development Bank is hereby authorized to agree to and to accept the amendments to the Articles of Agreement in the proposed resolution entitled “Merger of Inter-regional and Ordinary Capital Resources”.
notes: Codificationis based on section 501 of title V of H.R. 3750, One Hundredth Congress, as introduced , and enacted into law by .Section 32 of Pub. L. 86–147Pub. L. 100–202Dec. 11, 1987
